description:
Implement `hx-steps` (T2 tier) — 4/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Multi-step wizard/stepper progress indicator.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-steps/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-steps.ts`, `hx-steps.styles.ts`, `hx-steps.stories.ts`, `hx-steps.test.ts`

**Props on `hx-steps`:** `orientation` (`horizontal`|`vertical`), `size` (sm/md/lg)
**Props on `hx-step` (child element):** `label` (string), `status` (`pending`|`active`|`complete`|`error`), `description` (string)

**Two-component pattern:** `hx-steps` (container, `role="list"`) + `hx-step` (item, `role="listitem"`). Both registered as custom elements.

**Slots on `hx-step`:** `icon` (custom step icon), `label`, `description`

**Events:** `hx-step-click` on `hx-steps` with `{ step, index }`

**CSS Parts:** `hx-steps`: `base`; `hx-step`: `base`, `indicator`, `label`, `description`, `connector`

**ARIA:** `hx-steps` gets `role="list"` + `aria-label`. Each `hx-step` gets `role="listitem"`. Active step indicator gets `aria-current="step"`.

**Visual:** Steps connected by lines. Complete steps show checkmark icon. Error steps show X. Active step highlighted. Connector line between steps changes color based on prior step status.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests pass, axe-core zero violations, Storybook with horizontal/vertical/all statuses, CEM accurate, bundle < 5KB combined.

Register both `hx-steps` and `hx-step` in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
